channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Qatar Force One Incident
item.description: The security flaws were foreseeable and avoidable.

item.title: Democrats may hold preliminary vote on 2028 presidential primary calendar this week
item.description: Democrats could vote this week on the order of their 2028 presidential primary calendar, though the decision may not be final.

item.title: Trump administration opens probe into Harvard's financial aid for international students
item.description: The Justice Department is investigating whether Harvard allows Chinese donors to create scholarships that exclude American students.

item.title: States Should Not Copy Congress's Housing Mistakes
item.description: Politicians blame Wall Street and landlords, but the real problem remains a lack of housing supply.
